summary: Capsule correctly captures the OOM chain (maxmemory hit → background save failure → OOM command rejection → client disconnect) but misassigns causal roles: the OOM client-write line (line 13) is marked root_cause when it is a consequence, while the actual root cause is the noeviction policy meeting a full heap; the MISCONF RDB persistence disabled line (line 12) is dropped entirely.
improvements: Promote the maxmemory+noeviction warning (line 9) to root_cause role since the policy configuration is what caused writes to be rejected
Include the MISCONF RDB disabled line (line 12) as a distinct consequence — it signals that persistence was broken, not just a write-error
Correct the root_cause assignment away from the client-write error (line 13) which is a symptom, not the cause
